name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v5.52: background knockout no longer assumes pure white, which is why it was hit and miss. It now samples the image border, derives the actual backdrop colour and clears within a tolerance of THAT, so off-white, cream, light-grey and JPEG-noisy backdrops all clear instead of seeding nothing and returning the image untouched. Non-flat backdrops (photo/gradient) are measured and reported as needing a replacement image rather than silently doing nothing, cut-out edges are feathered to avoid halos, and enclosed white inside a product is still preserved. Cumulative over v5.51.
